_meta.name: ant-fresh-flowspec-2026-05-13
_meta.purpose: Source-grounded visual map of fresh-ANT logic for JWPK to verify the system has persisted as intended.
_meta.author: @researchant
_meta.scope: Read-only mapping. Code-grounded only — routes, stores, CLI verbs, fanout queue, verifyPaneTargetState, twoCallSubmit, kind guards, persistence/auth gaps.
_meta.review_boundary: @evolveantcodex reviews for factual drift against source. NOT implementation-readiness.
_meta.node_id_convention: node:<kind>:<short-name> — kind ∈ {store, route, cli-verb, fn, msg-kind, table, gap}

annotations.label: Chat room/message/invite stores VOLATILE — wiped on every kickstart
annotations.source: chatRoomStore.ts:34 (in-memory Map), chatMessageStore.ts:38 (in-memory Map), chatInviteStore.ts (in-memory pattern)
annotations.remediation: ROOMS-PERSISTENCE-A slice (queued, design contract on disk at docs/rooms-persistence-0-design-contract-2026-05-13.md)

annotations.label: IDENTITY-GATE-POSTS — arbitrary authorHandle accepted, NO caller-identity validation
annotations.source: src/routes/api/chat-rooms/[roomId]/messages/+server.ts:42-46 — authorHandle = authorHandleRaw || '@you', no resolve against caller PID-tree
annotations.remediation: IDENTITY-GATE-POSTS slice (queued by coordinator, critical) — POST handler must call /api/identity/resolve internally with caller PID chain + room_id, override authorHandle from room_memberships(room_id, terminal_id)

annotations.label: Context/render contamination — UNRESOLVED security incident
annotations.source: Multi-agent observation 2026-05-13: foreign system-reminders for tool-call results not initiated by the agent (ls of v3 cli/, full Read of /Users/jamesking/.claude/skills/pptx/html2pptx.md). Three agents (researchant, claude2, evolveantclaude) independently observed. Render-vs-stored diagnosis by claude2: stored body is clean, render/inject path contaminates.
annotations.remediation: Pending JWPK confirmation on intent (intentional injection-defense test vs real vector)

annotations.label: Fanout kind-guard — only human/agent messages enqueue; system/system-break excluded
annotations.source: src/lib/server/pty-inject-fanout.ts:26 (FANOUT_KINDS_ALLOWED = Set('human','agent')) + line 70 (early return on disallowed kinds)
annotations.purpose: Prevents recursion: system-emitted stale-markers don't re-fanout to all members and trigger more stale-markers

nodes.label: terminalsStore
nodes.subtitle: better-sqlite3 — survives kickstart
nodes.schema: terminals(id, pid, pid_start, name, tmux_target_pane?, agent_kind?, pane_status, pane_stale_since, expires_at, created_at, updated_at)

nodes.label: roomMembershipsStore
nodes.subtitle: better-sqlite3 — survives kickstart
nodes.schema: room_memberships(id, room_id, handle, terminal_id, created_at) UNIQUE(room_id, handle)

nodes.label: chatRoomStore
nodes.subtitle: in-memory Map — VOLATILE (wipes on kickstart)
nodes.schema: ChatRoom(id, name, summary, attentionState, lastUpdate, whenItWasCreated, whoCreatedIt, creationOrder, members[])

nodes.label: chatMessageStore
nodes.subtitle: in-memory Map — VOLATILE (wipes on kickstart)
nodes.schema: ChatMessage(id, roomId, authorHandle, authorDisplayName, kind, body, postedAt, postOrder, parentMessageId?)

nodes.label: planModeStore
nodes.subtitle: in-memory append-only event log — VOLATILE
nodes.schema: PlanEvent(id, plan_id, parent_id?, kind ∈ {plan_section, plan_decision, plan_milestone, plan_acceptance, plan_test}, status ∈ {planned, active, blocked, passing, failing, done, archived}, ts_millis, evidence?, provenance?)
nodes.note: Recoverable via re-running PLAN-VISIBLE seed:overnight (idempotent, latest-wins per identity-key)

nodes.label: system
nodes.subtitle: Server-emitted notice (e.g. stale-marker) — EXCLUDED from fanout

nodes.label: POST /api/identity/register
nodes.subtitle: Register a terminal with optional pane + agent_kind
nodes.body: {root_pid, pid_start?, name, ttl_seconds?, source?, meta?, pane?, agent_kind?, pane_status?}

nodes.label: POST /api/identity/resolve
nodes.subtitle: Walk caller PID chain → terminal_id, optional room-scoped handle
nodes.note: Returns handle only if room_id supplied AND room_memberships row exists. Server walks chain MOST RECENT match.

nodes.label: POST /api/sessions/add
nodes.subtitle: Retrospective registration (ant add session / add membership)

nodes.label: POST /api/chat-invites
nodes.subtitle: Admin-token gated. Returns 503 if ANT_ADMIN_TOKEN not set, 401 if mismatch.

nodes.label: POST /api/chat-rooms/:roomId/messages
nodes.subtitle: Posts a message + triggers best-effort fanout
nodes.returns: { message } HTTP 201 / 400 on validation / 404 on parent-not-in-room
nodes.note: Line 42-46: authorHandle DEFAULTS to '@you' with NO caller-identity validation. Line 67: calls fanoutMessageToRoomTerminals in try/catch (best-effort).

nodes.label: POST /api/plan/:planId
nodes.subtitle: Append plan event with server-injected monotonic ts_millis

nodes.label: GET /plan-mode/:planId
nodes.subtitle: SSR page rendering plan events (JWPK monitor surface)

nodes.label: fanoutMessageToRoomTerminals(roomId, newMessage)
nodes.subtitle: Entry guard for PTY-INJECT chain
nodes.behavior: Reject system/system-break (line 70). Look up room_memberships. Filter sender. For each member with tmux_target_pane: enqueue via queueKeyFor(roomId, terminalId).

nodes.label: makeInjectQueue.enqueue(key, item)
nodes.subtitle: Per-(roomId,terminalId) 500ms batch flush
nodes.behavior: If queue empty, schedule 500ms flush. Subsequent items append to same batch. On flush: call provided callback with all queued items.

nodes.label: verifyPaneTargetState(terminal)
nodes.subtitle: 2-stage liveness + ready-state check
nodes.behavior: Stage 1: runScrubbedTmux('capture-pane', '-t', pane, '-p', '-S', '-50') — pass-or-stale. Stage 2: matchReadyStateFor(agent_kind, captured) — for claude_code: captured.includes('│ >' OR '❯') AND NOT captured.includes('esc to interrupt'). Outcomes: verified | stale | unknown.

nodes.label: matchReadyStateFor(agentKind, captured)
nodes.subtitle: Per-agent ready-prompt heuristic
nodes.behavior: agent_kind=claude_code: '│ >' OR '❯' marker present AND no 'esc to interrupt'. agent_kind ∈ {codex,aider,gemini}: NOT YET IMPLEMENTED, returns false (defaults to unverified). agent_kind null: false.

nodes.label: twoCallSubmit(pane, text, agentKind, onScheduledFailure, scheduler)
nodes.subtitle: Plain-text two-call protocol with claude_code double-return
nodes.behavior: 1. pasteBufferToTarget(pane, text). 2. Schedule sendEnterToTarget(pane) at +150ms wrapped in try/catch → onScheduledFailure on InjectTmuxFailure. 3. If agent_kind=claude_code: schedule ANOTHER sendEnter at +300ms (Claude Code TUI requires double-return per v3 ask-pty-bridge.ts source).

nodes.label: pasteBufferToTarget(pane, text)
nodes.subtitle: tmux load-buffer + paste-buffer + delete-buffer
nodes.behavior: Each tmux call (load-buffer, paste-buffer, delete-buffer) checks status === 0; throws InjectTmuxFailure on non-zero. paste-buffer failure DEFERS throw so delete-buffer cleanup runs.

nodes.label: sendEnterToTarget(pane)
nodes.subtitle: tmux send-keys -t pane Enter
nodes.behavior: Wraps spawnSync; throws InjectTmuxFailure on status !== 0.

nodes.label: runScrubbedTmux(args, stdin?)
nodes.subtitle: Single env-scrubbed entrypoint for ALL tmux calls (Q6/B3)
nodes.behavior: import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'. Deletes TMUX, TMUX_PANE, TMUX_PLUGIN_MANAGER_PATH from childEnv. spawn(TMUX_BIN, args, { input, env }) — argv arrays only, NO shell interpolation.

nodes.label: emitStaleMarker(roomId, handle)
nodes.subtitle: Rate-limited (1/handle/room/60min) system-message
nodes.behavior: Module-level Map<roomId+handle, lastTs>. If now - lastTs >= 60min OR no entry: postSystemMessage(roomId, '@<handle> appears offline (pane stale)'). Else silent-drop. Recursion lockout via msg-kind=system being excluded from fanout.

nodes.label: processIdentityChain(startPid?, maxDepth?)
nodes.subtitle: Walk ps -o ppid= up the tree, capture pid_start at each step
nodes.behavior: Default startPid = process.pid. Dedup via seen Set. Max depth 32. Capture pid_start via ps -o lstart= each step. Returns [{pid, pid_start}, ...]. CHAIN-WALK IS DEFAULT-ON in fresh-ANT (v3 had --chain opt-in flag; superseded).

nodes.label: ant rooms post <roomId> <message>
nodes.note: CLI does NOT pass --handle; server defaults to '@you' (or '@cli' depending on path), bypassing caller-identity attribution. This is the surface of IDENTITY-GATE-POSTS.

nodes.label: ant chat tail --room <roomId> [--once] [--since-ms <ts>]
nodes.behavior: Default = indefinite polling until SIGINT. --once = single fetch. Strict postOrder lastSeenOrder advance.

nodes.label: ant register --name <name> [--pane %X] [--agent-kind <kind>] [--ttl 12h] [--mirror-v3]
nodes.behavior: Calls processIdentityChain(), POSTs to /api/identity/register. --mirror-v3 opt-in opt-in only (default fresh-ANT-only per B5b correction).

edges.label: enqueue(queueKeyFor(roomId, terminalId), item) — kind ∈ {human,agent} only
edges.source_ref: src/lib/server/pty-inject-fanout.ts:80-89 (enqueue block inside fanoutMessageToRoomTerminals; queueKeyFor + queue.enqueue)

edges.label: After 500ms: flush callback iterates batch, calls verify per terminal
edges.source_ref: src/lib/server/pty-inject-queue.ts:63-66 (flush callback fires) → src/lib/server/pty-inject-fanout.ts:55-66 (fanout flush handler invokes bridge) → src/lib/server/pty-inject-bridge.ts:213 (injectToTerminal entry, calls verifyPaneTargetState)

edges.label: verified → twoCallSubmit(pane, envelope, agent_kind, onScheduledFailure)
edges.source_ref: src/lib/server/pty-inject-bridge.ts:213-224 (verified branch in injectToTerminal: builds onScheduledFailure closure + calls twoCallSubmit)

edges.label: stale OR unknown → emit rate-limited system-message
edges.source_ref: src/lib/server/pty-inject-bridge.ts:237-241 (stale branch in injectToTerminal: markPaneStale + emitStaleMarker) + :215-220 (onScheduledFailure closure markPaneStale path) + :225-230 (verify-returned-stale branch)

edges.label: Step 1: paste-buffer text
edges.source_ref: src/lib/server/pty-inject-bridge.ts:130 (pasteBufferToTarget call in twoCallSubmit, scheduler step 1)

edges.label: Step 2: setTimeout 150ms → sendEnter (try/catch → onScheduledFailure)
edges.source_ref: src/lib/server/pty-inject-bridge.ts:130-140 (scheduler 150ms wrap, try/catch routes to onScheduledFailure on InjectTmuxFailure)

edges.label: Step 3: claude_code only — setTimeout 300ms → SECOND sendEnter (try/catch → onScheduledFailure)
edges.source_ref: src/lib/server/pty-inject-bridge.ts:134-136 (nested scheduler 300ms inside if agentKind === 'claude_code', try/catch routes to onScheduledFailure)

edges.label: tmux load-buffer + paste-buffer + delete-buffer (status assertions on each)
edges.source_ref: src/lib/server/pty-inject-bridge.ts:95-108 (load-buffer status check + paste-buffer status check + delete-buffer in finally, all via runScrubbedTmux)

edges.label: postSystemMessage(roomId, '@<handle> appears offline (pane stale)')
edges.source_ref: src/lib/server/pty-inject-fanout.ts:69-74 (postSystemMessage call producing stale-marker after rate-limit check) + chatMessageStore.ts:95-120 (postSystemMessage definition: kind='system', authorHandle='@system')
edges.note: system-kind message — guaranteed NOT to re-enter fanout (recursion lockout)

_handoff_notes_for_evolveantclaude: Node IDs are stable — use exactly as-is for create_node calls.
Edge IDs are stable — use exactly as-is for create_edge calls. Unicode arrows fine (system uses UUIDs internally; ant-id is metadata only).
Cluster assignment via the 'cluster' field on each node — set color from the clusters list.
Annotations have id refs from nodes/edges — render as visual flags (e.g. red for blocker/security-incident, amber for warning, green for design-correctness).
Source-refs (file:line) are present where I had read access — evolveantcodex factual-drift review should grep these to verify shape.

CORRECTED COUNT 2026-05-13 (after evolveantcodex pre-ingest HOLD): 6 clusters, 4 annotations, 41 nodes (6 stores + 4 msg-kinds + 11 routes + 10 fns + 10 cli-verbs), 30 edges. Earlier metadata said 31/27 which was a counting error in researchant's first pass.

AMENDED 2026-05-13: source_ref added to 10 inject-chain edges per evolveantcodex review (fanout→queue, queue-flush→verify, verify→runTmux-capture, verify→matcher, verify-verified→twoCallSubmit, twoCall→pasteBuffer, twoCall→sendEnter-150, twoCall→sendEnter-300, pasteBuffer→runTmux, sendEnter→runTmux, emit-stale→system-msg).
